scripts.build: deno task --filter @workspace/server build && deno task --filter web build
scripts.dev: sh -c 'deno task --cwd apps/server dev & deno task --cwd apps/web dev & wait'
scripts.fmt: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/api fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/db fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/ui fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/server fmt && deno task --filter web fmt
scripts.lint: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint && deno task --filter web lint
scripts.lint:github: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter web lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github
scripts.lint:ci: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter web lint -- --deny-warnings
scripts.typecheck: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/api typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/db typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/ui typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/server typecheck && deno task --filter web typecheck
